ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (researcher, data analyst, administrator) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions for the user (read, write, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Name of the species */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the metadata */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the dataset */,
  "documentation" TEXT /* Detailed documentation for the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data included in the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hatch_rates" (
  "hatch_date" TEXT /* Date when the eggs hatched */,
  "new_09" REAL /* Hatch rate for new eggs with a 0.9 factor */,
  "new_1" REAL /* Hatch rate for new eggs with a 1.0 factor */,
  "old_09" REAL /* Hatch rate for old eggs with a 0.9 factor */,
  "old_1" REAL /* Hatch rate for old eggs with a 1.0 factor */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the species the eggs belong to */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the data was collected */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature during the hatch period */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity during the hatch period */,
  "egg_size" REAL /* Size of the eggs */,
  "incubation_period" INTEGER /* Incubation period */,
  "number_of_eggs" INTEGER /* Number of eggs */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hatch_date", "species_id", "location_id")
)
column_names: Role of the user (researcher, data analyst, administrator)
Permissions for the user (read, write, delete)
Hatch rate for new eggs with a 0.9 factor
Hatch rate for new eggs with a 1.0 factor
Hatch rate for old eggs with a 0.9 factor
Hatch rate for old eggs with a 1.0 factor
Reference to the species the eggs belong to
Reference to the location where the data was collected
Additional notes or comments about the data
